name: Christmas Stollen (Quick-bread Variety)
recipeIngredient: 8 Cardamon seed pods, seeds removed and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, sugar, salt, mace, and crushed cardamon seeds. Stir in the ground almonds.
3. Cut in the softened butter until the mixture looks like coarse sand.
4. In a blender, cream the egg with the cream cheese, vanilla, almond extract, and brandy. Pour into a bowl and stir in the dried fruit.
5. Gradually stir in the flour mixture until everything is well blended. Work the dough into a ball and turn onto a lightly floured board.
6. Knead for a few minutes until smooth, then place in the refrigerator for at least 15 minutes (store in the refrigerator for several days).
7. Shape the dough into a flat, oval loaf, about 10 inches long and eight inches wide.
8. Crease the loaf about 1/2 inch off center with the blunt edge of a knife.
9. Fold the smaller side of the creased loaf over the wider side.
10. Brush the top of the folded loaf with melted butter.
11. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet and bake for about 45 minutes, until it starts to turn brown on the outside.
12. Remove from oven and allow to cool slightly before dusting lightly with powdered sugar.
